meta.title: inblock.io | Trust Infrastructure for Digital Sovereignty
meta.description: Aqua embeds cryptographic verification directly into your files, making them portable, permanent, and independently verifiable anywhere.

hero.headline: Trust that travels with your data.
hero.sub: In a world of deepfakes and autonomous AI, trust should be built into the data itself — not just the platforms that hold it. Aqua embeds cryptographic verification directly into your files, making them portable, permanent, and independently verifiable anywhere.
hero.secondary: Stop relying on central servers to prove what happened. Aqua embeds verification directly into your data so it can be checked anywhere, independently. Aqua creates a portable memory for your data.

products.heading: What We Build
products.subheading: The Aqua ecosystem provides tools for trusted data, verified identity, and secure AI operations.

aquafire.title: AquaFire
aquafire.description: Your all-in-one platform for data notarization, document management, and digital identity.

aqua_node.title: Aqua-Node
aqua_node.description: Run your own decentralized notarization node. Anchor data integrity directly into the network without intermediaries.

aqua_agents.title: Aqua-Secured Agents
aqua_agents.description: Equip AI agents with verifiable identity and tamper-proof operation logs. Every action is accountable.

solutions.heading: Solutions
solutions.subheading: Whether you need compliance, security, or verifiable data exchange — Aqua has a solution for your challenge.

esignature.title: eSignature
esignature.description: Legally binding electronic signatures with built-in cryptographic verification and tamper-proof audit trails.

document_signing.title: Document Signing
document_signing.description: Sign, notarize, and share documents with portable proof of authenticity that follows the document everywhere.

supply_chain.title: Supply Chain Tracking
supply_chain.description: Track goods, certifications, and handoffs across your supply chain with independently verifiable records.

ai_security.title: AI Operational Security
ai_security.description: Ensure every AI decision, data access, and model output is logged with immutable, verifiable records.

data_provenance.title: Data Provenance
data_provenance.description: Meet regulatory requirements (EU AI Act, GDPR) with continuous, built-in data origin and processing history.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.description: Automate compliance with verifiable audit trails that satisfy regulators without manual documentation.

company.heading: Independent Trust Infrastructure
company.description_1: inblock.io assets GmbH is a 100% founder-held company that has received approximately €1 million in grants and investments to build an independent trust infrastructure called Aqua Protocol.
company.description_2: Our vision is to be the trust and protocol company that enables other businesses to thrive — more secure, more effective, and fully sovereign over their data.
company.equity_description: We do not sell equity in the holding company. The protocol and intellectual property must remain independent to guarantee trust infrastructure sovereignty. Industry verticals, however, operate as separate entities with shared equity — open to investors and partners who want to scale impact in specific sectors.
company.description_3: We are actively seeking partners to scale our impact across industries, and investors to enter industry verticals through dedicated sub-companies.

footer.tagline: Building trust infrastructure for digital sovereignty, one solution at a time.
